text:
Market today: A cautious mood for tech, despite general market optimism around summer breaks. Key drivers are tech-specific news like Microsoft's job cuts and AI-related concerns, which directly impact your concentrated tech/chip portfolio.

Your holdings: SOXL is down 23.52% and flagged 'SELL' – a leveraged ETF that decays, so it needs a tight watch. SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is already down 11.17% and will move fast. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a very close eye on your leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and their stops. Also, monitor how broader tech reacts to news like Microsoft's cuts and AI concerns.

Bottom line: Manage your risk on leveraged positions aggressively, especially with tech headwinds emerging.
plays: SOXL is flagged 'SELL' and down 23.52%. Consider trimming or exiting to manage risk on this leveraged position.
SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is down 11.17%. Respect its stop at 21.38 to limit further losses on margin.
LRCX shows a 'BUY' setup (9/12). Entry 349.85-349.23, stop 347.77. This is a tech long with good value.
